text:
噂に聞いていたとおりね。
しかも私がイメージしたとおり！

さばいてみないとわからないけど
見た感じに間違いはないわ。

鮮度が落ちないうちに
手早く調理にかかるわ。
今回もあり

This is exactly like the rumors I'd heard, and
just like I'd imagined!

I guess I still have to carve into it a bit
before I know for sure, but this definitely
seems like just what I was after.

Better get right to it. Wouldn't want to waste
one bit of freshness. Thanks again!
